headline: SBA Communications Stock Soars on Buyout Interest. What It Means for Tower Stocks.
summary: SBA Communications stock has surged on takeover interest, but analysts warn a potential deal could cap valuations across the tower industry.

headline: KKR Targets Cakes And Ports While Valuation Signals Mixed Investor Picture
summary: KKR (NYSE:KKR) agreed to acquire Nothing Bundt Cakes from Roark Capital for approximately US$2b. The firm is also involved as a potential bidder for a controlling stake in Associated British Ports. These transactions touch both consumer franchising and core infrastructure, adding new angles to KKR's deal activity. For you as an investor, these moves highlight how KKR continues to work across different parts of the private markets, from branded consumer concepts to essential transport...
